timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData

    Method
    Description
    static ChoiceDescriptionData<DirectoryEntry>
    TextIOUtils.buildChoiceDescriptionDataFromDirectory(String dir, DirectoryListFilterType listFilterType, DirectoryListOrderType listOrderType, boolean excludeHiddenFiles, String regexp, boolean regexpFilesOnly, boolean nameAndType, boolean addAbandon, boolean addCurrentDirectory, boolean addParentDirectory)
    From the given directory list the directory entries as strings subject to the controls
    static ChoiceDescriptionData<DirectoryEntry>
    TextIOUtils.buildChoiceDescriptionDataFromDirectory(Path dir, DirectoryListFilterType listFilterType, DirectoryListOrderType listOrderType, boolean excludeHiddenFiles, String regexp, boolean regexpFilesOnly, boolean nameAndType, boolean addAbandon, boolean addCurrentDirectory, boolean addParentDirectory)
    From the given directory list the directory entries as strings subject to the controls
    static <T extends Enum<T>>
    ChoiceDescriptionData<Enum<T>>
    TextIOUtils.buildChoiceDescriptionDataFromEnumClass(Class<? extends Enum<T>> enumclass)
    Given the enum class build a ChoiceDescriptionData representing all of the constants in the enum
    static <T extends Enum<T>>
    ChoiceDescriptionData<Enum<T>>
    TextIOUtils.buildChoiceDescriptionDataFromEnumValues(Enum<T>[] enumconstants)
    Given an array of possible the enum constants build a ChoiceDescriptionData representing the supplied values
    static <T extends Enum<T>>
    ChoiceDescriptionData<Enum<T>>
    TextIOUtils.buildChoiceDescriptionDataFromSampleEnumValue(Enum<T> enumconstant)
    Given an enum constant builds a choice description data for all the values of the enum class, setting the specific value of the enum constant as the default
    static <T extends Enum<T>>
    ChoiceDescriptionData<Enum<T>>
    TextIOUtils.buildChoiceDescriptionDataFromSampleEnumValue(Enum<T> enumconstant, boolean setAsDefault)
    Given an enum constant builds a choice description data for all the values of the enum class, if setAsDefault is true setting the specific value of the enum constant as the default
    ChoiceDescriptionData<P>
    ChoiceDescriptionData.clone()
    Do a shallow clone, with the exception that the list of choice descriptions is a new list, but contains the original choice descriptions

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static int
    TextIOUtils.getIntChoice(String prompt, ChoiceDescriptionData<?> choiceDescriptionData)
    Displays the prompt, then the strings in the choice description data entries.
    static <T> T
    TextIOUtils.getParamChoice(String prompt, ChoiceDescriptionData<T> choiceDescriptionData)
    Displays the choices in the choice description data, asks the user to enter a number representing the choice.
    static String
    TextIOUtils.getStringChoice(String prompt, ChoiceDescriptionData<?> choiceDescriptionData)
    Displays the prompt, then the strings in the choice description data entries.
